quickStart.title: Quick Start
quickStart.body: Welcome to Luzhanqi! Create or join a game to start playing.

steps.title: Create or Join
steps.description: Either create a new game as host or join an existing game using a game ID.

steps.title: Wait for Players
steps.description: Wait for another player to join. The host can start the game when ready.

steps.title: Game Settings
steps.description: Configure game options like fog of war before starting.

steps.title: Drag and Drop Pieces
steps.description: Drag pieces from the top area to your half of the board. Each piece has specific placement rules.

steps.title: Piece Placement Rules
steps.description:
• Flag must be in the back row
• Bombs and landmines cannot be in the front row
• All pieces must be placed

steps.title: Submit Your Board
steps.description: Click "Send Board Placement" when all pieces are placed correctly.

steps.title: Making Moves
steps.description: Click on your piece to select it, then click on a valid destination. Click "Send" to confirm.

steps.title: Piece Hierarchy
steps.description: Higher rank pieces capture lower rank pieces. Equal ranks result in both pieces being destroyed.

steps.title: Special Rules
steps.description:
• Engineer can safely defuse landmines
• Bombs destroy any attacking piece
• Flag capture wins the game

steps.title: Victory Conditions
steps.description: Capture the opponent's flag to win, or force them to forfeit.

steps.title: Game Statistics
steps.description: View remaining and lost pieces for both players.
